name: dire-agent
description: Manage local Dire Agent chats and folder-scoped projects from Codex desktop.

interface.shortDescription: Use your local Dire Agent daemon from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Create and continue persistent standalone chats or sandboxed folder projects through the local Dire Agent daemon.
defaultPrompt: List my Dire Agent chats and projects.
Create a standalone Dire Agent chat.
Continue my most recent Dire Agent conversation.
